name: humanizer
description: Strips AI-tell patterns from text, including em-dash overuse, inflated symbolism, rule of three, vague attributions, AI vocabulary, and similar patterns. Includes humanizer-espanol, a Spanish variant with register calibration (academic, technical, rioplatense colloquial).

interface.longDescription: Writing and editing plugin for removing AI-tell patterns from prose, tightening phrasing, reducing inflated structure, and preserving the author's intended meaning.
